service.name: Twilio Verify API
service.description_for_ai: Two-factor authentication API. Send OTP via SMS, WhatsApp, email, or voice call. Verify user phone numbers. Global delivery. Pay per verification. Replaces building your own OTP system.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Send a one-time password (OTP) code to a user's phone via SMS, WhatsApp, voice call, or email. Part of 2FA flow.

ServiceSid.description: Verify Service SID starting with 'VA' — created in Twilio Console → Verify → Services

To.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format: +79161234567 (Russia), +12125551234 (US)

Channel.description: Delivery channel: sms (default), call (voice), whatsapp, email, totp (authenticator app)

Locale.description: Language for OTP message: en, ru, de, fr, es, etc.

CustomFriendlyName.description: Override service name in OTP message

capabilities.description_for_ai: Verify the OTP code entered by the user. Returns approved if correct, pending/canceled if wrong or expired.

ServiceSid.description: Verify Service SID (same as used in send_otp)

To.description: Same phone number used in send_otp

Code.description: 6-digit OTP code entered by the user
